summary: Color-graded CBP montage paired with the on-screen and tweet text 'Every domain. Every day. One team securing the homeland' and 'Border Security is National Security.' It cuts between a drone shot over an American suburb at golden hour, a top-down aerial of a shipping container port, a backlit close-up of a man with face and neck tattoos in profile against a desert sunset, a shot of a woman and several children sitting outdoors eating, and a shot of a black CBP UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter carrying a large American flag on a line over the desert. Metadata did not detect an audio track.

script.scene: Drone aerial at golden hour over an American suburban neighborhood with autumn trees, streets, and single-family homes.
Top-down aerial of a shipping container terminal, gantry cranes moving stacks of colorful containers.
Tightly cropped, backlit close-up of a man with face and neck tattoos in profile against a desert sunset.
Shot of a woman and several children sitting outdoors eating together by a hedge.
A black CBP UH-60 Black Hawk hovers over open desert hoisting a large American flag on a long line, mountains behind. On-screen and tweet text 'Border Security is National Security.'

notable_text: Every domain. Every day. One team securing the homeland. / Border Security is National Security.
